nasb.text: For Solomon went after Ashtoreth the goddess of the Sidonians and after Milcom the detestable idol of the Ammonites.

esv.text: For Solomon went after Ashtoreth the goddess of the Sidonians, and after Milcom the abomination of the Ammonites.

cnv.text: 因為所羅門隨從西頓人的女神亞斯他錄，和亞捫人可憎的偶像米勒公。

ccb.text: 所罗门拜西顿人的女神亚斯她录和亚扪人的可憎神明米勒公。
